title: Training Coordinator
description: Travelers, a leading insurance company, seeks a Training Coordinator to deliver employee development programs across our organization. Working fully remote, you'll design training content, manage schedules, and support compliance education. Build your career in learning and development while supporting an organization that values continuous growth.
responsibilities: Coordinate scheduling and logistics for training programs and workshops
Develop training materials and support curriculum design
Track training completion, engagement, and learner feedback
Manage learning management systems and training records
Support compliance and regulatory training requirements
Communicate training needs and deadlines to managers

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; Bachelor's degree preferred
skills: Microsoft Office and training technology platforms

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
